title: clematis angustifolia var. insularis
intro: Clematis angustifolia var. insularis, also known as Insular Clematis or Mountain Clematis, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Clematis angustifolia var. insularis include reducing inflammation and pain, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it can also be used topically to treat wounds and skin conditions.
